channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
item.description: Armed groups launched coordinated attacks across Mali. Clashes occurred in the centre and north. Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of the country in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

item.title: AI To Run 50% Of UAE Government Services By 2028 In Global First
item.description: The UAE plans to run 50% of its government services using AI by 2028, a global first. The rollout will be phased and performance-assessed. AI To Run 50% Of UAE Government Services By 2028 In Global First.

item.title: US Israel Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'No meeting is planned' - Iran rules out direct
item.description: Iran has ruled out direct talks with the US in Islamabad, asserting engagement only through Pakistan. No meeting is planned between the two nations. US Israel Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'No meeting is planned' - Iran rules out direct talks with US in Islamabad; asserts engagement only through Pakistan The Times of India.

item.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi met with Pakistan's Army chief Munir, but there is no clarity on whether direct talks between Washington and Tehran will take place during the visit. Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir.

item.title: Indonesian UN peacekeeper becomes sixth killed in Lebanon
item.description: An Indonesian soldier has become the sixth UN peacekeeper killed in recent hostilities in southern Lebanon. The incident occurred in the midst of ongoing tensions in the region. Indonesian UN peacekeeper becomes sixth killed in Lebanon.

item.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
item.description: Seven people died in a Russian attack on Ukraine. Dnipro was hardest hit. Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine.

item.title: Trump-Epstein Videos Projected Onto Washington DC Building
item.description: Videos projecting Trump-Epstein visuals, including photographs and documents, were displayed on a Washington DC building. The display included images connected to the late financier. The visuals included photographs and documents connected to Epstein.

item.title: Flights resume at Tehran airport as US-Iran ceasefire holds
item.description: International flights have resumed at Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport after weeks of disruption due to the US-Iran war. The ceasefire appears to be holding. International flights have resumed at Tehran’s Imam Khomeini International Airport, after weeks of disruption by the war.

item.title: In A First, Press-Critic Trump To Attend Media Event On Saturday
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump will attend a media event on Saturday, marking a rare appearance at a press gathering. Some members of the press corps have expressed objections to his participation.

item.title: Germany to dispatch minesweeper for possible Hormuz mission
item.description: Germany will send a minesweeper for a possible mission in the Strait of Hormuz. Several countries are ready to join a neutral mission. Several countries have said they are ready to take part in a "neutral" mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump To Host Crypto Contest Winners As $TRUMP Coin Plunges 96% From Peak
item.description: Trump will host 297 $TRUMP token holders who won a contest. The $TRUMP coin has fallen 96% from its peak. The 297 largest $TRUMP token holders who registered for the contest will attend the gathering.

item.title: Armed groups stage simultaneous attacks across Mali
item.description: Armed groups attacked Mali's capital and main airport. Several locations across the country were also targeted. Armed groups have attacked Mali’s capital, its main airport, and several locations across the country.

item.title: How sport is helping protect girls in Uganda
item.description: Coach Zuena Cheptoek in eastern Uganda uses her running program to protect girls from female genital mutilation, child marriage, and abuse. Her program provides a safe space for girls to receive mentorship and support.

item.title: The Barcelona Moment: Progressive in a Multipolar World
item.description: The Barcelona Moment discusses progress in a multipolar world. Latinoamérica 21 is the source of this discussion. The Barcelona Moment: Progressive in a Multipolar World Latinoamérica 21.

item.title: Europe Prepares for a Longer War in Ukraine, With No Strategy to End It
item.description: Europe is preparing for a longer war in Ukraine. Neither Russia nor Ukraine has a clear path to victory or a negotiated peace. With American dealmakers wrapped up with Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a clear path to victory.

item.title: Russian strikes kill six across Ukraine
item.description: Russian strikes killed six people across Ukraine. Attacks occurred in multiple locations. Russian strikes kill six across Ukraine Newsbug. info.

item.title: Iran war could push over 32 million people into poverty; UN warns of 'triple shock' for developing
item.description: Iran war may push 32 million people into poverty, the United Nations warned. Iran war could push over 32 million people into poverty; UN warns of 'triple shock' for developing nation The Times of India.

item.title: As Italy Rejects Equal Parental Leaves, 'Dad Influencers' Step Up
item.description: Diego Di Franco documents life as a primary caregiver in Italy. Diego Di Franco documents life as a primary caregiver to his children. As Italy Rejects Equal Parental Leaves, 'Dad Influencers' Step Up.

item.title: US Millionaire Killed By Elephant Herd While Hunting Antelope In African Jungle
item.description: Ernie Dosio, 75, was killed by elephants during an antelope hunt in Gabon. Ernie Dosio, 75, is killed by a herd of elephants during an antelope hunt in Gabon's rainforest.

item.title: Zelenskyy ready to hold Ukraine-Russia talks in Azerbaijan
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is ready to hold talks with Russia in Azerbaijan. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said his country is ready to hold talks with Russia in Azerbaijan. Meanwhile, Russian attacks killed several people across Ukraine.
